Package BusinessLayer

Class XOR

java.lang.Object
BusinessLayer.Component
BusinessLayer.XOR
public class XOR extends Component
Represents a 2-input XOR (Exclusive OR) logic gate component.

The XOR gate outputs true (1) only when exactly one of its inputs is true. This class handles pin initialization, logic computation, drawing, and cloning.

Example usage: 
     XOR xorGate = new XOR(100, 50);
     xorGate.compute();  // updates output pin based on inputs

  • Constructor Details

    • XOR

      public XOR(int x, int y)
      Constructs a XOR gate at the specified coordinates. Initializes its input and output pins.
      Parameters:
      x - The X-coordinate of the gate
      y - The Y-coordinate of the gate

  • Method Details

    • initializePins

      protected void initializePins()
      Initializes the input and output pins for the XOR gate. The gate has 2 input pins on the left and 1 output pin on the right.
      Specified by:
      initializePins in class Component

    • updatePinPositions

      protected void updatePinPositions()
      Updates the positions of input and output pins when the gate is moved.
      Specified by:
      updatePinPositions in class Component

    • compute

      public void compute()
      Computes the XOR logic for this gate. Sets the output pin to true if exactly one input is true, otherwise false.
      Specified by:
      compute in class Component

    • draw

      public void draw(Graphics g)
      Draws the XOR gate on the provided graphics context. Includes arcs for the gate shape, input/output lines, and selection highlight.
      Specified by:
      draw in class Component
      Parameters:
      g - The Graphics object used for drawing

    • cloneComponent

      public Component cloneComponent()
      Creates a copy of this XOR gate. The clone has the same size and position but no connections.
      Specified by:
      cloneComponent in class Component
      Returns:
      A new XOR component with identical properties
